tool_design.role_in_intervention: Formal incident record for every genuine excursion or stock-safety event.
tool_design.usage_moment: During or immediately after a real excursion event
tool_design.expected_output: Completed incident report with timeline, stock decisions, and follow-up actions

failure_warnings.warning: The form is completed too late.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: Evidence and sequence are lost during the incident.
early_signals: No owner or timing is captured
prevention: Make completion part of incident closure
Keep the form close to the manager

failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The record cannot support due diligence or follow-up.
early_signals: Stock decisions have no basis noted

content:
# Excursion Incident Report Form **Tool ID:** T003-02 **Block:** B003 (Temperature Excursion Response) **Domain:** Food Safety & Hygiene (D01_food_safety) **Level:** L2 **Format:** Template **Role:** Manager / Duty Lead **Time Required:** 10-15 minutes **Version:** 2.0 --- ## What This Tool Is For Use this form for every genuine excursion event, equipment failure, or stock safety decision that goes beyond a simple corrected reading. This is the evidence document for: - what happened - what stock was affected - what decisions were made - who was informed - what needs follow-up after the incident --- ## Incident Header | Field | Details | |---|---| | Date | | | Time discovered | | | Unit affected | | | Found by | | | Manager handling | | | Engineer called? | Yes / No | --- ## Reading And Timeline | Item | Details | |---|---| | Air temperature found | | | Product temperature(s) found | | | Estimated start time of excursion | | | Estimated duration | | | Cause suspected | Door / Power / Overloading / Equipment fault / Unknown | | Unit recovered by | | --- ## Stock Assessment | Product Group | Temp Found | Decision | Quantity / Cost | Notes | |---|---|---|---|---| | Milk / dairy | | Keep / Use soon / Discard | | | | Ready-to-eat fillings | | Keep / Use soon / Discard | | | | Desserts / pastries | | Keep / Use soon / Discard | | | | Frozen stock | | Keep / Transfer / Discard | | | --- ## Immediate Actions Taken
  • Door checks and simple-cause checks completed
  • Stock isolated or transferred
  • Engineer or owner contacted if needed
  • [T003-03] used for stock decision
  • Team briefed not to use affected unit or stock
### Action Notes __________________________________________________ __________________________________________________ __________________________________________________ --- ## Business Impact | Item | Details | |---|---| | Stock discarded value | | | Service disruption | Low / Medium / High | | Alternative storage used | | | Customer impact | None / Potential / Actual | --- ## Follow-Up Actions | Action | Owner | Due Date | Status | |---|---|---|---| | Repair / maintenance | | | Open / Closed | | Staff retraining | | | Open / Closed | | SOP / process update | | | Open / Closed | | Trend tracker updated | | | Open / Closed | --- ## Sign-Off **Completed by:** ____________________ **Reviewed by:** ____________________ **Date closed:** ____________________ --- ## Connected Resources **Use with:** - T003-01 - Temperature Excursion Response Card - T003-03 - Time-Temperature Stock Assessment Matrix - T003-04 - Excursion Trend Tracker & Root Cause Log - T003-05 - Temperature Excursion SOP & Drill Guide --- *Tool Version 2.0 - the record that proves the response was controlled, not improvised.*
